message.content:
import { Map, Swords, Trophy, Target, Shield, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { Callout } from '@/components/mdx/Callout'
import { Card, CardGrid } from '@/components/mdx/CardGrid'
import { Checklist } from '@/components/mdx/Checklist'
import { FAQ } from '@/components/mdx/FAQ'
import { Steps, Step } from '@/components/mdx/Steps'
import { Section } from '@/components/mdx/Section'
import { YouTubeEmbed } from '@/components/mdx/YouTubeEmbed'

export const metadata = {
  title: "Bizarre Lineage King Crimson Build: Master the Time Eraser 2026",
  description: "Unleash the full potential of your King Crimson build in Bizarre Lineage with this comprehensive guide. Learn optimal combos, best fighting styles like Boxing and Vampire, and advanced PvP strategies for 2026.",
  category: "Guide",
  image: "https://placehold.co/800x400/8B0000/fff?text=King+Crimson+Build",
  date: "2026-03-04",
  author: "Bizarre Lineage Wiki Team"
}

<Callout type="info" title="Quick Guide">
- Master the **bizarre lineage king crimson build** by pairing it with **Boxing** and **Vampire** fighting styles.
- Utilize King Crimson's signature abilities like **Time Erase**, Epitaph, and Impale for devastating combos.
- Focus on high **Destructive Power** and **Conjuration** for optimal skill manifestation and damage.
- Learn to counter stands like Crazy Diamond and Whitesnake, but be wary of Made in Heaven.
- Efficiently farm raids and inner spirit battles for quick leveling and awakening progress.
</Callout>

The world of Bizarre Lineage offers a myriad of powerful Stands, but few command the battlefield with the strategic dominance of King Crimson. If you're looking to master the art of time manipulation and unleash devastating combos, understanding the optimal **bizarre lineage king crimson build** is paramount. This guide will delve deep into King Crimson's unique abilities, recommended fighting styles like Boxing and Vampire, and essential strategies to dominate both PvE and PvP encounters in 2026. Prepare to erase your opponents from existence and carve your path to victory. Whether you're a seasoned player or just starting your journey, this comprehensive breakdown will equip you with the knowledge to maximize King Crimson's true potential.

<Section icon={Sparkles} title="King Crimson Overview & Acquisition">
King Crimson stands as a formidable force in Bizarre Lineage, renowned for its unique time-erasing capabilities and potent melee attacks. It's often considered a pure assassin, excelling in 1v1 engagements due to its ability to negate damage and set up powerful combos. Acquiring this S-Tier Stand is a key step towards a dominant playstyle.

**Video Highlights:**
- Demonstrates the journey from a new player to obtaining King Crimson and its initial skills.
- Showcases early combat with King Crimson's basic moves like Barrage and Chop.
- Explains the process of rolling for Stands using Stand Arrows.
- Highlights the manifestation of King Crimson's model as Conjuration levels increase.
- Covers early game progression and skill point allocation for King Crimson.

<YouTubeEmbed videoId="QM58QimuvyY" title="Going From Noob To KING CRIMSON Diavolo In Bizarre Lineage...(Roblox)" />

King Crimson is primarily obtained through a **Stand Arrow**. As one of the rarer Stands in the game, players should be prepared for multiple attempts. Stocking up on Stand Arrows before committing to the roll is highly recommended to increase your chances. Once acquired, King Crimson requires 110 points for its full Awakening, which unlocks its ultimate potential.

| Aspect         | Details                                       |
| :------------- | :-------------------------------------------- |
| **Rarity**     | Rare (Requires multiple Stand Arrows)         |
| **Tier**       | **S Tier** (Overall Ranking)                  |
| **Type**       | Melee, Assassin                               |
| **Specialty**  | Time Manipulation, Counter-based Combos       |
| **Awakening**  | Requires **110 Points**                       |

<Callout type="tip">
Always aim to have a good supply of **Stand Arrows** before attempting to roll for King Crimson. Its rarity means it might take several tries, but the payoff for this S-Tier Stand is well worth the effort.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Swords} title="Core Abilities & Strategic Play">
King Crimson's toolkit revolves around precise timing, aggressive melee, and its iconic Time Erase ability. Mastering each move is crucial for maximizing your damage output and survivability in Bizarre Lineage. Understanding when and how to deploy these skills can turn the tide of any battle.

| Move           | Key | Type     | Description                                                                 |
| :------------- | :-- | :------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Heavy Punch**| E   | Melee    | A standard powerful punch, often used to initiate or extend combos.         |
| **Epitaph**    | R   | Counter  | A defensive counter that can set up offensive opportunities.                |
| **Time Erase** | Z   | Special  | Grants temporary invisibility and invulnerability, often resetting HP.      |
| **Impale**     | V   | Melee    | A high-damage execution move, can be reactivated for a follow-up grab.      |
| **Eye Gouge**  | C   | Special  | A powerful attack that can blind opponents and deals significant damage.    |

**Time Erase** is King Crimson's most iconic ability, offering moments of invulnerability. During its activation, you can avoid incoming damage and reposition, or even regain health depending on the specific mechanics. This move is a game-changer, allowing for aggressive plays without fear of reprisal. **Impale** is a high-damage move that can be chained, providing excellent combo extension, while **Epitaph** offers a crucial counter to enemy attacks, opening them up for your own assault. Eye Gouge, while having a wind-up, deals heavy damage and can inflict blindness, disrupting enemy vision and control.

<Callout type="warning" title="Mastering Wind-ups">
Many of King Crimson's powerful moves, such as **Chop** and **Eye Gouge**, have noticeable wind-up animations. Practice timing these abilities to ensure they land effectively, especially against agile opponents.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Target} title="Recommended Builds & Combo Execution">
To truly unlock the potential of your **bizarre lineage king crimson build**, pairing it with the right fighting style is essential. The consensus among top players points to **Boxing** and **Vampire** as the optimal choices, creating a synergy that enhances King Crimson's already impressive combat capabilities. This combination provides both offensive power and crucial defensive utility, making you a force to be reckoned with.

| Stand        | Fighting Style | Synergy Benefit                                                                  |
| :----------- | :------------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **King Crimson** | **Boxing**     | Two counters (Dempsey Roll, Epitaph), combo extenders (Liver Crusher, White Fang). |
| **King Crimson** | **Vampire**    | Enhanced regeneration, damage buffs, additional stun/freeze abilities.           |

**Boxing** is highly recommended for its two powerful counters, Dempsey Roll and Epitaph, which can be used to extend combos and provide defensive options. Moves like White Fang offer knockback, leading into further attacks, while Liver Crusher acts as a direct combo extender. When combined with King Crimson's abilities, Boxing creates an unrelenting offensive pressure. **Vampire** complements this by offering sustain and additional utility, making your build even more resilient and capable of prolonged fights.

<Steps>
  <Step num="1" title="Initiate with M1s or Counter">
    Start with basic melee attacks (M1s) to open up your opponent, or use **Epitaph** or a Boxing counter (e.g., Dempsey Roll) to punish their aggression.
  </Step>
  <Step num="2" title="Chain with White Fang/Impale">
    Follow up with Boxing's **White Fang** for knockback, or King Crimson's **Impale** (reactivating for the grab) to keep the opponent vulnerable.
  </Step>
  <Step num="3" title="Utilize Combo Extenders">
    Weave in **Liver Crusher** (Boxing) or additional M1s/Chop to maintain pressure and extend the combo window.
  </Step>
  <Step num="4" title="Apply Time Erase for Advantage">
    If the combo is dropped or you need to reset, activate **Time Erase** for invulnerability, repositioning, or HP regain.
  </Step>
  <Step num="5" title="Finish with High Damage">
    Conclude with **Eye Gouge** or a charged Chop for massive damage, or another Impale for execution.
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Callout type="tip">
Practice combining King Crimson's **Impale** with Boxing's **Dempsey Roll**. Impale can set up the perfect window for a guaranteed Dempsey Roll, leading to massive damage and combo potential.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Shield} title="PvP Strategy & Matchup Dynamics">
Understanding your matchups is crucial for success with a King Crimson build in Bizarre Lineage. While King Crimson is a dominant force, especially in 1v1s, certain Stands can pose a significant threat. Knowing how to leverage your strengths and mitigate your weaknesses is key to mastering PvP.

<CardGrid cols={2}>
  <Card title="King Crimson Strengths">
    - **High damage combos**
    - Invulnerability with Time Erase
    - Excellent counter abilities
    - Strong 1v1 potential
    - Combo extension capabilities
  </Card>
  <Card title="King Crimson Weaknesses">
    - **Vulnerable during wind-ups**
    - Can be outmaneuvered by fast Stands
    - Relies heavily on precise timing
    - Limited ranged options
    - Susceptible to certain zoning tactics
  </Card>
</CardGrid>

King Crimson excels at countering Stands like **Crazy Diamond** and **Whitesnake**, utilizing its mobility and time manipulation to bypass their defenses or oppressive abilities. However, it faces a tough challenge against **Made in Heaven**, whose extreme speed can often nullify King Crimson's time erasure and make its wind-up attacks difficult to land. Always be aware of your opponent's Stand and adapt your strategy accordingly.

| Matchup Type   | Stands                                  | Strategy                                                              |
| :------------- | :-------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Counters**   | **Crazy Diamond**, **Whitesnake**       | Use Time Erase to bypass healing/defenses; punish with quick combos.  |
| **Weak Against**| **Made in Heaven**                      | Focus on defensive Epitaphs; try to catch them during predictable moves.|
| **Even Matchups**| Star Platinum, The World                | Relies heavily on skill and timing; utilize counters and invulnerability.|

<Callout type="warning" title="Avoiding Common Mistakes">
Never engage without a fighting style. A King Crimson build without **Boxing** or **Vampire** significantly reduces its combo potential and survivability. Always ensure your build is optimized before entering competitive play.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Trophy} title="Leveling & Awakening Progression">
The journey to fully Awaken King Crimson requires dedication and strategic grinding. Reaching the necessary 110 points involves effective farming methods and smart skill point allocation. This progression path ensures your Stand manifests its full power, allowing you to dominate the Bizarre Lineage battlefield.

<Checklist
  id="kc-progression"
  title="Key Progression Milestones:"
  items={[
    "Acquire King Crimson via Stand Arrows",
    "Max out Destructive Power for damage",
    "Increase Conjuration for Stand manifestation",
    "Defeat Jottoro, Abdoul, and Dio raids",
    "Complete 50 World Events for Awakening"
  ]}
/>

Early leveling can be efficiently done by fighting your inner spirit, especially when your HP is low, as it scales with your level. This provides valuable Conjuration points. As you progress, raids become a primary source of experience and rewards. The **Abdoul raid**, in particular, is noted for its ease and good experience yield, making it a prime target for farming. Chests obtained from raids and quests also provide substantial experience when opened in bulk.

To reach the **110 points for King Crimson's Awakening**, you must complete specific challenges: defeating Jottoro, Abdoul, and Dio in raids, and then an arduous task of completing **50 World Events**. While the raid bosses are straightforward, the World Events can be a significant time investment.

| Stat                 | Priority | Effect                                                               |
| :------------------- | :------- | :------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Destructive Power**| **High** | Increases damage output for all Stand abilities and M1s.            |
| **Conjuration**      | **High** | Improves Stand manifestation, unlocking new skills and visual clarity.|
| **Durability**       | Medium   | Increases your health pool, improving survivability.                |
| **Speed**            | Low      | Affects movement speed and attack speed slightly.                   |
| **Specialty**        | Medium   | Boosts effectiveness of unique Stand mechanics like Time Erase.     |

<Callout type="success">
Prioritize investing skill points into **Destructive Power** and **Conjuration** early on. This ensures your King Crimson hits hard and manifests properly, unlocking its full potential faster.
</Callout>
</Section>

<Section icon={Map} title="Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)">

<FAQ items={[
  {
    question: "How do I get King Crimson in Bizarre Lineage?",
    answer: "King Crimson is obtained by using a **Stand Arrow**. Due to its rarity, you may need to use multiple arrows before successfully acquiring it."
  },
  {
    question: "What is the best fighting style for a King Crimson build?",
    answer: "The recommended fighting styles for a **bizarre lineage king crimson build** are **Boxing** and **Vampire**. Boxing provides counters and combo extenders, while Vampire offers sustain and additional utility."
  },
  {
    question: "What does King Crimson's Time Erase ability do?",
    answer: "Time Erase grants temporary invisibility and invulnerability, often allowing you to reset your HP to its state at the beginning of the ability. It's excellent for escaping dangerous situations or setting up new attacks."
  },
  {
    question: "What Stands does King Crimson counter?",
    answer: "King Crimson is effective against Stands like **Crazy Diamond** and **Whitesnake**, using its unique abilities to overcome their defensive or restrictive playstyles."
  }
]} />

</Section>
